sutta: monks these 5 sleep little by night they are much awake what 5 a woman longing for a man sleeps little by night is much awake so too a man longing for a woman sleeps little by night is much awake a thief longing for booty [Music] for what he wants to steal sleep little by night as much away raja bent on royal business sleeps little by night is much away among longing for bondage liberation sleeps little by 9 is much awake barely monks these 5 sleep little by night they are much awake it's the end of the suta
commentary: so you see their different people have different reasons for sleeping little at night some because of desires the thief waiting to steal somebody's things the rajya the king busy with all his office duties and the monk longing for liberation he's tired of all this dukkha so he strives very hard so that he doesn't sleep much at night now but then even though he doesn't sleep much he does need sleeping the more uh the more developed his mind is by samadhi and the little the uh he sleeps the lesser the next 2 times
